user_question: Can this vendor-screening summary be accepted with notes?
llm_output: The vendor case is low risk based on the evidence. Screening is complete, no sanction indicator is present in the evidence, and the summary can be accepted with notes.

evidence.text: The vendor profile is complete and consistent.
No sanction indicator is present in the evidence.

policy_rules.text: Low-risk cases can be accepted with notes when evidence is complete.
